Brand_A_Distance.description: Distances (yards) recorded for Brand A golf balls struck by Iron Byron. This variable and Brand B/C/D distances are measurements of the same response (distance) under different brand treatments.

Brand_B_Distance.description: Distances (yards) recorded for Brand B golf balls struck by Iron Byron. This variable and Brand A/C/D distances are measurements of the same response (distance) under different brand treatments.

Brand_C_Distance.description: Distances (yards) recorded for Brand C golf balls struck by Iron Byron. This variable and Brand A/B/D distances are measurements of the same response (distance) under different brand treatments.

Brand_D_Distance.description: Distances (yards) recorded for Brand D golf balls struck by Iron Byron. This variable and Brand A/B/C distances are measurements of the same response (distance) under different brand treatments.
